description: Style NoteStrikingly chic, this top from femella is a detail-oriented deconstruction of a wardrobe essential. Pared down to the basics, with a flowy silhouette, pair this with a pencil skirt and pumps. For a formal or casual feel wear this with denims or formal pants.Product DetailsPeach top made of blended fabric, has a mandarin collar with a split neckline, chest hooked placket, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and an elasticated hemMaterial and CareBlended fabricWash dark colours separatelyDry inside outDo not bleach or wringWarm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 32") wears a size M
